c.d: Number of movies and TV shows available on the app
Whether the app requires a paid subscription, offers free content, or both
Range of genres and types of movies available, including originals and exclusives
Usability features such as watchlists, search functions, recommendations, and social sharing
Operating systems supported such as Android, iOS, smart TVs, and web
Availability of free movies and shows with or without ads
Ability to share watchlists, get recommendations from friends, and track viewing
